## 🔧 Type of Change
<!-- Check the relevant boxes by placing an x inside the brackets like [x] -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] ✨ New Feature
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / Refactor
- [ ] 🚑 Hotfix

## 🚨 Criticality
<!-- Check the relevant box -->
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] P0 / Critical

## 📸 Screenshot / Proof of Work
<!-- Paste your screenshots, videos, or verification steps here -->


## ✅ Checklist
<!-- Make sure you have completed the following steps before requesting a review -->
- [ ] My code follows the app's current styling and visual guidelines.
- [ ] My code does not break any existing functionality.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have attached screenshots/notes proving my code successfully runs.
